messages.content: List exactly 5 Bible verses about comfort in hard times. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

message.content:
Matthew 6:34 Take heed, lest ye think; For today shall be saved from your affliction.  
John 16:33 In all these things handle with patience and comfort one another to have hope of his love.  
Romans 8:27 And he that searcheth the hearts knoweth what is the mind of man. So let us not lose heart, for we shall be saved by him who loves us.  
1 Peter 5:6 Humble yourselves under God's mighty hand at this time, and in due season he will lift you up to his own glory.  
Isaiah 40:31 And they shall renew their strength; that with new eyes they may see the light of the Lord.
